_description: Party resolution cache for Tool 3 litigation scanners. Written by tools/party_resolver.py per D-003 and D-009. Key = normalized_name (lowercase, suffix-stripped). Value = resolution record. Cache is write-through on confidence >= 0.85 ONLY. Entries are append-mostly; re-verification rule is 180 days (see D-009). DO NOT hand-edit entries unless correcting a known-bad resolution; prefer re-running the resolver with --force.

_entry_schema.ticker: primary ticker (may be null for private-sub resolutions)
_entry_schema.issuer_figi: OpenFIGI share-class FIGI; null until ticker->FIGI step completes
_entry_schema.issuer_name: canonical issuer name as recorded by SEC
_entry_schema.method: one of: cache_exact, sec_edgar_exact, sec_edgar_fuzzy, exhibit21_direct, exhibit21_indirect, openfigi_name
_entry_schema.resolved_at: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when entry was first written
_entry_schema.last_verified_at: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when entry was last re-verified (may equal resolved_at)
_entry_schema.source_raw_name: the raw docket-caption string that produced this entry (for debugging)

_seed_status: EMPTY. Seeding deferred to next session when Cowork sandbox is available for live EDGAR + OpenFIGI calls. Target: 20 hand-validated cases covering S&P 500 majors, wholly-owned subs (Exhibit-21 path), and individual/government party classes for negative coverage.
